/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libsbmpo.so -o libsbmpo.so CMakeFiles/sbmpo.dir/src/grids/ImplicitGrid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbmpo.dir/src/queues/PriorityQueue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbmpo.dir/src/algorithms/Astar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbmpo.dir/src/models/UnicycleSteeringModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbmpo.dir/src/models/AckermannSteeringModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbmpo.dir/src/models/DoubleIntegratorModel.cpp.o
